name: POLICY-BACKLOG-7
title: coding-rules.md should reference TDD discipline mandated by CLAUDE.md
description: Top-level CLAUDE.md mandates TDD via /rabbit-feature-touch ('full TDD cycle (spec -> test-green). TDD is token-heavy; skip it only for trivial edits'). But coding-rules.md section 4 'Goal-Driven Execution' only talks generically about tests and gives examples like 'Write a test that reproduces it, then make it pass' without naming TDD as the governing process. Add explicit cross-reference to the TDD workflow and the trivial-edit override, so subagents know the rule when CLAUDE.md is not in their context. Location: .claude/features/policy/coding-rules.md section 4, lines 54-70.

history.note: duplicate of POLICY-BACKLOG-6 (filed twice due to worktree race)
